_doc: Claude Brain · Shitcode Red-Light config. Copy this to config.json (in your BRAIN_DIR, default ~/.claude-brain/) and flip enabled:true to turn it on. Tune any threshold here — one place, no code changes.
_skip_note: Paths containing any of these substrings are skipped. '.claude-brain' exempts the tool's own dir. Add your private paths (notes/journals/memory stores) so the tool never reads them.
